title: LoftyHomes
description: A simple yet elegant - definitely the best home plugin for your players!
body:
![LoftyHomes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e46fe8eb8517226df014dc4cdd929cbc865b226.jpeg)
# Home Setting Made Easy
A simple plugin that allows players to set their homes!  
[Source Code](https://github.com/Swiftens/LoftyHomes/tree/master)

## Permissions
- loftyhomes.sethome - Allows the player to set their home.
- loftyhomes.delhome - Allows the player to delete their home.
- loftyhomes.home - Allows the player to teleport to their homes.
- loftyhomes.others.sethome - Allows the player to set other players' home.
- loftyhomes.others.delhome - Allows the player to delete other players' home.
- loftyhomes.others.home - Allows the player to teleport to other players' homes.

### Stay Tuned for the Planned Features!
- Message Configuration
- A configuration option to teleport on to the center of the block instead of the current location
- Multiple sethomes via permissions
- Teleportation sounds
- Teleportation warm-up and cooldown
- Set homes with economy.
- Home GUI

## Check Out My Other Plugins!
[![LoftyDailyRewards](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f478c2a8df8440498ae82309d37be2df97c7d87.jpeg)](https://modrinth.com/plugin/loftydailyrewards)
